overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player character moves from a covered sidewalk beneath elevated highways, navigates a street intersection with futuristic vehicles, and ascends a concrete staircase to an upper city level, passing NPC pedestrians and cyberpunk architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, passing billboards on the left

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive yellow neon structural framework and red signage
massive concrete and steel highway structure running overhead with support pillars
large advertising posters mounted on the sidewalk barrier wall
multi-lane city street with red curbs and futuristic vehicles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway in a futuristic city. A distinctive yellow neon-lit tower dominates the left side while the camera moves forward along the asphalt sidewalk, passing advertising billboards. The area is sheltered from direct sunlight by the overpass above.

events.description: turns right at the corner to follow the street alongside the elevated highway
futuristic silver sedan drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating the street corner and walking along the road, observing passing traffic and storefronts

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving along the street past the camera position

entered.detail: multi-story building with large digital advertisements and neon signage
wide road intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings
metal scaffolding and construction barriers along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the corner into a more open intersection area, transitioning from the covered sidewalk to an exposed street crossing. Commercial buildings with digital billboards line the right side while futuristic vehicles pass by on the road. The elevated highway remains a constant overhead presence as the camera approaches a staircase.

events.description: turns left toward the concrete staircase leading up to the upper level

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and turning toward the staircase entrance, approaching the ascent

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to the elevated highway level
green metal industrial structure with glass walkways and staircases
single palm tree in planter box near the staircase entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the highway overpass, the scene becomes more enclosed and industrial. The camera approaches a wide concrete staircase flanked by a green industrial structure on the right and a palm tree on the left. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial as the camera turns to face the ascending stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase to upper city plaza

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs toward the upper level
reaches the top of the stairs and enters the upper level plaza area

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs, passing NPCs descending, and reaching the upper plaza with neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright yellow jacket and pink shorts descending the stairs
pedestrian standing near the NCART station entrance at the top of the stairs

entered.detail: open concrete plaza at the top of the stairs with scattered papers and neon signage
futuristic metro station entrance with yellow NCART signage and glass canopy
bright neon advertisements and store signs above the upper level shops

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ascent up the concrete staircase, transitioning from the enclosed underpass to an upper city plaza. The camera passes pedestrians descending in bright futuristic clothing and reaches the top where an NCART metro station entrance and neon storefronts become visible. The ground is littered with papers and trash, typical of the cyberpunk urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban underpass that gradually ascends into a bright, bustling upper city plaza. It begins on a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past advertising billboards and a dominant yellow neon tower. As the camera turns right at a corner, the scene opens into an exposed intersection where futuristic vehicles pass by commercial buildings and digital displays. The environment then shifts back into a more enclosed industrial space under the overpass, passing a palm tree and a green structure before turning toward a wide concrete staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs past pedestrians in bright clothing, emerging from the shadows of the underpass to reveal an NCART metro station and neon storefronts overlooking a trash-strewn plaza.
